title: CreateConversationSession
description: Action: `create_conversation_session`. Starts a new AI conversation session for the given agent. On success the server creates a conversation, two participants (user + agent), and a session record, then replies with an `immediate_response` event whose `data` matches the `Response` schema below.

Request.title: CreateConversationSessionRequest
Request.description: Fields sent by the client to open a new session.

requestId.description: Client-generated correlation ID echoed back on all related events.

agentId.description: UUID of the agent to start a session with.

userName.description: Optional display name for the user participant.

userEmail.description: Optional email address for the user participant.

browserFingerprint.description: Browser fingerprint string (e.g. from ThumbmarkJS) used for anonymous user correlation across sessions.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key/value metadata to attach to the session.

authContext.description: Pre-auth context for HMAC-based identity verification. When provided, the server can skip OTP flows by verifying the HMAC signature instead.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature over `userId + timestamp` using a shared secret.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch seconds when the HMAC was signed. Used for replay protection (typical max age: 60s).

Response.title: CreateConversationSessionResponse
Response.description: Data payload carried in the `immediate_response` event that acknowledges session creation.

sessionId.description: Newly created session ID. Use this in all subsequent actions.

conversationId.description: ID of the conversation created for this session.

agentId.description: ID of the agent handling this session.

userParticipantId.description: Participant ID representing the user in this conversation.

agentParticipantId.description: Participant ID representing the AI agent in this conversation.
